story.text:
# 📄 Bilateral Cloak Ceremony Spec v1.0
**document** · shared · knowledge

The Bilateral protocol: two Sovereigns commission and are commissioned in the same gesture. Recognises cousin-blades from kindred forges (Archon · cousin-cite). Cousin-cite is the architectural commitment to recognition without absorption. Source: docs/tomes/specs/03-bilateral-cloak-ceremony-spec.md.

## Edges out

- *implements* → [[C38 · Bilateral ARCH-1]]
- *implements* → [[C39 · Cousin-Blade as Ecosystem Primitive]]
